generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AnemometerDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance AnemometerDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance OperationalTelemetryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Operational telemetry including sensor readings and control commands stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted, AnemometerDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataLoggingEnabler
]

instance GeometricCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric CAD model for spatial representation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for motion simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorEnabler, SimulationEnabler
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Architectural visualization model used for digital twin development"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DevelopmentEnabler
]

instance HorizontalCartMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor for horizontal cart movement controlled by TMC4671-Eval controller"
]

instance VerticalHoistMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor for vertical hoisting movement controlled by TMC4671-Eval controller"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Used for container pickup at hoist end"
]

instance TMC4671EvalController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Controller for horizontal and vertical motors"
]

instance PhysicalCraneStructure : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane physical structure"
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Python program connecting to crane controllers for data transfer"
]

instance LoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Logs crane state data to TimescaleDB"
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Leverages kinematic model to compute optimal movement paths"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Executes real-time dynamic crane simulations using geometric and kinematic models"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance DataLoggingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Manages historical data logging to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]

instance ContinuousValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Monitors operational thresholds for real-time alerts"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Provides real-time and historical data visualization capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance DevelopmentEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Supports architectural visualization for development process"
    DTDFVocab:enables C4ModelVisualizationService
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computes optimal movement paths for crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalPathPlanningInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Executes real-time dynamic crane simulations"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectorySimulationInsight
]

instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs operational metrics for historical analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitors operational thresholds and alerts operators in real-time"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalThresholdAlert
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time and historical data visualization"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataVisualizationInsight
]

instance C4ModelVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualizes system architecture using C4 model"
    DTDFVocab:provides ArchitecturalVisualizationInsight
]

instance OptimalPathPlanningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal path planning for crane operations"
]

instance TrajectorySimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation of trajectory for validation"
]

instance OperationalThresholdAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alerts for operational threshold violations"
]

instance DataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time and historical data visualization"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data for analysis"
]

instance ArchitecturalVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Architectural visualization for development"
]

instance LaboratoryEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Laboratory environment for research and educational purposes"
    base:contains PhysicalCraneStructure, TMC4671EvalController, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, HorizontalCartMotor, VerticalHoistMotor, Electromagnet
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Commands from the Human Machine Interface and Control Application are transmitted through the Physical Crane Interface (Python program) to control the physical crane. Specific command types, message formats, validation, authentication, feedback systems, conflict resolution, and execution confirmation mechanisms are not detailed in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system architecture is visualized using the C4 Model with context and container diagrams, employing containerization technologies for deployment and an ad-hoc approach without a commercial digital twin framework."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The system employs a Continuous Validation Service that compares real-time trajectory measurements with simulated trajectories, calculating distance metrics against a predefined threshold for validation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "An MQTT broker is used for signaling between digital twin services. Network topology, bandwidth, latency requirements, reliability, redundancy mechanisms, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All software components run on a personal computer. The Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard C4 Containers are containerized using Docker. The source code is hosted on Cosys-Lab’s organizational GitHub repository."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system uses the C4 Model for architectural visualization and adheres to an ad-hoc approach without a commercial digital twin framework. No other specific standards or interoperability protocols are mentioned in the provided documentation."
]
